commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=3340a1d4639611b96f3f1047f5f8a2f6bbe5fe9a)
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds Claude CLI JSONL `tool_use` detection and forwards CLI tool-start events through the CLI runner into reply tool-progress callbacks.

PR surface: Source +96. Total +96 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: the changed CLI callback calls `onToolStart` directly, while the current embedded handler gates tool progress through message-tool-only suppression state. I did not run a live Telegram or channel repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Contributor proof is still required, and the remaining code issue affects channel delivery semantics rather than a safe autonomous repair lane while proof is missing.

target.title: feat(cli): add tool_use streaming to CLI JSONL parser
target.body:
## Summary

The shared CLI JSONL streaming parser (`createCliJsonlStreamingParser`) only extracted `thinking_delta` and `text_delta` — it completely ignored `tool_use` content blocks. This meant CLI backends (`claude-cli`, `claude-cli-interactive`) never emitted tool progress events, so interleaved tool names (e.g. "Using Read…") couldn't appear in Telegram/Discord/WhatsApp.

This PR adds tool event support across the full CLI pipeline:

1. **Parser** (`cli-output.ts`): detect `content_block_start` with `type: "tool_use"`, call new `onToolUse` callback
2. **Emitter** (`execute.ts`): wire `onToolUse` → `emitAgentEvent({ stream: "tool", data: { phase: "start", name, toolCallId } })`
3. **Live session** (`claude-live-session.ts`): thread `onToolUse` through `createTurn` / `runClaudeLiveSessionTurn`
4. **Bridge** (`agent-runner-cli-dispatch.ts`): new `createToolEventBridge` subscribing to `stream: "tool"` events on the global agent event bus, parallel to existing assistant text bridges
5. **Caller** (`agent-runner-execution.ts`): pass `onToolEvent` to `runCliAgentWithLifecycle` so CLI runs trigger `onToolStart` / `signalToolStart` identically to embedded PI agent runs

## Depends on

- #87072 (interleaved progress renderer that consumes these events)
- #81851 (interactive backend that benefits from tool streaming)

## Test plan

- [x] Build passes
- [ ] Telegram message triggering tool use shows interleaved tool names in streaming preview
- [ ] Embedded PI agent path unaffected (no regressions)

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
